author: antoineart
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Duplicate a file from the tab or file-explorer right-click menu. Creates a -copy file next to the original and opens it.

manifest.author: AntoineArt
manifest.description: Duplicate a file from the tab or file explorer right-click menu. Creates a copy next to the original and opens it.
manifest.name: Tab Duplicate
